verses.text: Kei pen sawltak ka hi a, mihingte' khutnuai-a nasem ka hi kei hi. I Topa Jesuh tawh a kimu mi ka hi a, Topa-a' dingin na ka sepna hangin note pen thu um a suak na hi uh hi
Midangte in sawltakin hong ngaihsun ta kei le uh, note in sawltakin na hong ngaihsut uh a kul ahi hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa sungah na omna uh pen sawltak ka hihlam a kilatna ahi hi
Mite in kei hong mawhsak uh ciangin ka gen thu in
Ka nasepna hangin annek tuidawn hong kipiak ding mah ahi hi
Sawltak dangte, Topa' naute, leh Peter mah bangin ka khualzinna-ah thu um mi ka zi a tonpih theiding ka hi hi
Kei leh Barnabas bek, nektawmzon' tawh a thuahding ka hi zenzen kei uh hi
Kuamah in ama sum bei-in galkap na semlo uh hi. Leenggui suan napi-in a leenggah a nelo kuamah omlo hi. Tuu cing napi-in a tuunawi a nelo kuamah omlo hi
Hih ka hong gente pen mihingte' zat ngeina hi a, Thukham in zong a tuaci ding mahin a gen thu ahi hi
Bang hang hiam cih leh Moses Thukham sungah, “Buh a cil bawngtal a muk na tuam kei in,” ci hi. Hih bang a gen ciangin Pasian' lunghihmawh pen bawngtalte hi zenzenlo hi
Hih bang a gen ciangin ei mihingte hong cihnopna hi a, eite-a' dingin a kigelh thu ahi hi. Lo a khopa leh an a lapa in amau' ngahdingin a kilawm an a ngahdingin lametna tawh nasem ahi uh hi
Note lakah kha thu tawh kisai khaici hong vawh ka hih manun, note tung panin leitung nate ka ngah uh hangin a lianlua hilo hi

Midangte in note tung panin ngahtheihna ding thu nei uh ahih leh ko ka nei phazaw lai uh hi. Ahi zongin note tung panin ngahtheihna ding thu a om hangin bangmah ka hong la kei uh a, Khrih hangin Lungdamna Thu a dongtangsak ka suahkhak lohna dingun na khempeuhah ka thuak tentan uh hi
Biakinn-ah nasem dingin a kicial mite in biakinn mah panin an ngah uh a, biakna tau-ah na a semte in biakna sa mah a ngahna uh theilo na hi uh hiam
Tua mah bangin lungdamna thu a hilhte in tua nasepna mah panin nuntakna a ngahna ding uh Topa' thupiak ahi hi
Ahi zongin hih ngahtheih ding hamphatnate khempeuh ka la kei a, tu-in zong ka ngahtheihna dingin hih lai a hong gelh ka hi kei hi. Hih ka kisialhna teng a mawkna a suahding sangin ka si nuamzaw hi

Lungdamna thu ka hilh hangin kisialhna ding thu bangmah omlo hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh tua thu a hilh ding mahin a hong kisawl ahi hi. Tua ahih manin lungdamna thu hilh kei leng kei-a' dingin a dahhuai mahmah ahi hi
Keima utthu tawh a sem hi leng sep thaman ka lamen ding hi. Ahi zongin Pasian in a sem dingin hong sawl ahih manin ka sepding nasep a sem ka hi hi
Tua ahih leh ka sep thaman bang ahi hiam? Ka thaman pen, lungdamna thu tawh kisai ka sepna-ah thaman ngenloin, a khongin Lungdamna Thu hilhding hamphatna ka neihna ahi hi
Kei pen kuama khutnuai mi hiloin a suakta mi hinapi-in, mi a tam theithei ka ngahzawhna dingin mi khempeuh' khutnuai mi-in ka kibawl hi

Jew mite lakah na ka sep ciangin amaute ka ngahzawhna dingin Jew mite khat mah bangin ka gamta a, Moses Thukham ka zuihding a kisaploh hangin a zuite ka ngahzawhna dingin amaute lakah na ka sep ciangin amaute mah bangin ka gamta hi

Tua mah bangin Jew mite' Thukham in a huamloh Gentail mite lakah na ka sep ciangin amaute ka ngahzawhna dingin Gentail mite bangmahin ka gamta hi. Hih bangin ka gen ciangin Pasian' thukham a zuilo, cihna hiloin Khrih' thukham zui-in a gamta ka hi hi
Upna neu mite lakah na ka sep ciangin amaute ka ngahzawhna dingin amaute mah bangin ka gamta hi. Tua ahih manin ahih theihna lam peuhpeuhah mite ka ngahzawhna dingin mi khempeuh' ngeina ka zui hi
Hih bangin ka gamtatna pen amaute tungah Lungdamna Thu ka tuttheihna ding leh keima nasep hoihtakin ka septheihna ding ka deihna ahi hi
Tai kidemna-ah mi khat bek in thaman a ngahding hinapi-in a vekpi-un tai veve uh hi. Tua ahih manin thaman na ngahzawhna dingun na tai un
Kimawlna sungah a kihel mi khempeuh in thu khempeuhah a pumpi uh uk ciat uh hi. Amaute pen a kisiathei pak a ngahna dingun a hanciam uh hi a, eite pen a kisia theilo i ngahna dingin a hanciam ihi hi
Tua ahih manin ngimna neilopi-in a mawktai ka hi kei a, huihlak khawng a mawktuptup ka hi kei hi
Kimawlna sungah midangte a kihel dingin a sam hinapi-in tua kimawlna-ah a kihel zolo mi ka suahkhak lohna dingin ka pumpi sekin hoihtakin ka ki-uk hi.
